properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who am I to stand in judgement As if I had never seen For if I had to list my failures I wouldn't know where to begin

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Who am I to not forgive you The way that gods forgiven me If it wasn't for compassion I don't know where I would be

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Love covers all Love covers all We all fail, we all fall But love covers all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who are we to still remember Things that one cause such regret Knowing what he has forgiven He has chosen to forget

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There is no more condemnation For the ones who dwell in him And his grace is still sufficient To reminds us once again

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Love covers all Love covers all
